rules.title: Invitation Rules
rules.rule1: Get a \$1 no-threshold coupon for every friend successfully invited to register.
rules.rule2: Friends need to complete their first order (paid amount ≥ \$15) to be considered successful.
rules.rule3: Each friend can only be invited once, repeated invitations are invalid.
rules.rule4: There is no upper limit for invitation rewards, the more you invite, the more you get.
rules.rule5: Invitation records are saved permanently and can be viewed at any time.
rules.reward1: \$1 no-threshold coupon, can be directly deducted from the order amount.
rules.reward2: The coupon is valid for 30 days, please use it within the validity period.
rules.reward3: Coupons cannot be used in conjunction with other promotional activities.
rules.reward4: Coupons are limited to use on Good Little Obedient Smart Lunch Box Vending Machines.
rules.reward5: Coupons cannot be transferred or exchanged for cash.
rules.note1: Inviting friends must be done through the official invitation link.
rules.note2: Friends need to complete real-name authentication after registration.
rules.note3: If malicious invitation behavior is found, the platform has the right to cancel the reward.
rules.note4: The final interpretation right of the event rules belongs to Good Little Obedient Smart Lunch Box Vending Machine.
rules.note5: If you have any questions, please contact customer service.
rules.process1: Share the invitation link to friends.
rules.process2: Friends register an account through the link.
rules.process4: The system automatically issues rewards to your account.
rules.process5: You can view invitation records in 'My Achievements'.
